intended_use: The intended use of the 5000 Compact series ultrasound systems is diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid flow analysis of the human body with the following Indications for Use: Abdominal, Cardiac Adu
intended_use_full: The intended use of the 5000 Compact series ultrasound systems is diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid flow analysis of the human body with the following Indications for Use: Abdominal, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric, Carotid, Cerebral Vascular, Cephalic (Adult), Cephalic (Neonatal), Fetal Echo, Fetal/Obstetric, Gynecological, Intraoperative (Vascular), Lung, Musculoskeletal (Conventional), Musculoskeletal (Superficial), Ophthalmic, Pediatric, Peripheral Vessel, Small Parts, Transesophageal (Cardiac), Transrectal, Transvaginal, and Urology.
target_condition: Adult cardiac echocardiography; evaluation of cardiac structure and function
ground_truth: Manual measurements performed by human clinical experts during routine care (clinical ground truth); human-human interobserver variability data from published clinical studies used to establish limits of agreement acceptance criteria
other_metrics: Limits of agreement (LoA) reported for 17 measurement detectors comparing automated output to clinical ground truth. Examples: Ao Sinus Diameter LoA [-11.0022%, 11.2816%] vs acceptance criteria [-35.0%, 35.0%]; LVIDd LoA [-14.1564%, 12.4223%] vs [-35.0%, 35.0%]; MV Peak E Vel LoA [-9.2081%, 9.1223%] vs [-24.0%, 24.0%]. All detectors met acceptance criteria.
